meta.goal: Control playback of the current track (play/pause, skip, scrub) and reach lyrics, queue, share, and sleep timer

score_rationales.usability: Conventional player layout with outcome-named actions and no dead ends, but the primary transport controls invite mis-taps — functional band, 75.
score_rationales.cognitive_load: One decision per moment with a single focal task and chunked metadata — top band, 88.
score_rationales.visual_layout: Grouping matches semantics and the squint test passes with one clear hierarchy — strong band, 86.
score_rationales.accessibility: Sub-20px touch targets on the main actions sit at the broken anchor despite every measured contrast passing — 30.
score_rationales.content: Labels name outcomes in user language with one consistent voice — strong band, 85.
score_rationales.trust_persuasion: No dark patterns and no high-stakes asks on screen — top band, 90.

one_big_thing: Hit areas were sized for a desktop cursor, not a thumb: every interactive element measures under half the 44px touch minimum while all static text passes its checks.

findings.element: playback transport controls, five buttons center-screen
findings.issue: All five playback controls are 19px squares, far below the 44px touch minimum.
findings.why_it_matters: Tightly packed sub-thumb targets cause mis-taps at the product's most-used moment, so users skip tracks when they meant to pause.
findings.recommendation: Enlarge each control to at least 44x44px and add spacing between them.
findings.evidence: measured: single control 19x19px; all five controls span a 115x19px row

findings.element: secondary action links row (Lyrics, Queue, Share, Sleep timer)
findings.issue: The four secondary links are 10px-tall tap targets packed into a single row.
findings.why_it_matters: Tap accuracy on targets this small is poor, sending users to the wrong feature or nowhere at all.
findings.recommendation: Give each link a 44px-tall tap area with wider separation.
findings.evidence: measured: 'Lyrics' link 10px tall; the four links span a 192x11px row; contrast 5.70:1 (passes)

clean_checks: WCAG-1.4.3: every measured text region passes AA on the dark theme (title 18.08:1, artist 5.69:1, footer links 5.70:1, time labels 5.48:1)
GST-01/GST-07: grouping matches semantics — artwork, track metadata, transport, and secondary links form distinct clusters
HICK-01: few, conventional choices at each moment; no decision overload
JAKOB-01: standard player layout (art, title, scrubber, transport) matches platform conventions
CNT-01: secondary links name their outcomes (Lyrics, Queue, Share, Sleep timer)
